formInstance.inputDocument: Abigail Lee is pleased to submit her work titled "Shattered Memories" for consideration in your esteemed literary magazine. This work falls under the genre of Poetry and comprises a word count of 105. The Author can be contacted via email at abigail.lee64@icloud.com. The work has not been previously published and this submission is made as a simultaneous submission. The Abstract/Summary for "Shattered Memories" is: "A collection of poems reflecting on the fragility of memory and the passage of time." Although a manuscript file is not provided, Abigail has expressed her preference for publication in the Spring 2024 issue. She has read and agreed to the submission guidelines and terms of publication. Abigail looks forward to the opportunity to have her poetry considered for inclusion in your magazine.

goldAnswers.Title: Shattered Memories
goldAnswers.Abstract/Summary: A collection of poems reflecting on the fragility of memory and the passage of time.
